title: Use Case 6: AI Executive Briefing
summary: Generate an English executive briefing from distributed source fragments using the runtime-hosted PlannerAI and SummarizerAI capabilities without inserting translation.

sourceFragments: Browser-side account telemetry shows that enterprise readers spend more time on concise executive summaries than on raw trace views.
Edge coordination logs report that regional rollout status is now stable enough to shift attention from incident response to operational planning.
Cloud portfolio analysis indicates that leadership teams want one English briefing that connects adoption, risk posture, and next actions.
